prompt: Add a new drawing tool `tool-arc-wall` to the 2D floor plan canvas with three-click arc drawing, BaseTool architecture, and drawArcWall renderer.

assertions.text: Output contains a BaseTool subclass with onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, and drawOverlay methods
drawArcWall rendering function uses ctx.arc(), ctx.arcTo(), or bezierCurveTo() — not a straight lineTo()
JSON wall schema includes start, end, midpoint (or controlPoint), thickness, and type fields
Exterior wall color #2C2C2C and interior #555555 (or equivalent project palette) used in drawArcWall
Math.round() or integer pixel coords used for canvas drawing (Hi-DPI / sub-pixel awareness)
ctx.save() and ctx.restore() bracket the drawing operations
Three-click workflow correctly staged: click 1 = start, click 2 = end, click 3 = arc midpoint (or equivalent two-phase approach)
